# PlaylistPanda

> PlaylistPanda is a hand-curated Spotify playlist channel run by Antonin Götz, based in Berlin. The channel focuses on independent music across genres like Deep House, Indie Folk, and German Rap.

## About

PlaylistPanda curates playlists on Spotify and accepts music submissions from independent artists via SubmitHub. The site also offers a PDF guide for artists and curators.

## Pages

- [Home](https://playlistpanda.net/): Main page with playlists, submission widget, and blog overview.
- [Playlist Curator Guide](https://playlistpanda.net/kurs.html): An 8-page PDF guide teaching independent artists how to become paid playlist curators on SubmitHub, Playlist Push, and Groover.
- [Blog: How to Become a Playlist Curator in 2026](https://playlistpanda.net/blog-playlist-curator.html): A practical guide covering the full process of building, growing, and monetizing a Spotify playlist as a curator.
- [Musicology & Media Studies](https://playlistpanda.net/musicology.html): Academic and semi-academic articles on music, sound, and media.
- [Hip-Hop in der DDR](https://playlistpanda.net/musicology-ddr-hiphop.html): Essay on how East German youth adopted US hip-hop culture behind the Iron Curtain (in German).

## Product

**Playlist Curator Guide for Independent Artists**
- Format: PDF, 8 pages, English
- Price: available on Ko-fi
- Topics: Building a playlist, choosing a niche, SubmitHub/Playlist Push/Groover, writing reviews, growing on TikTok, 90-day mindset plan
- URL: https://playlistpanda.net/kurs.html
